lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in fair condition. It shows visible wear on both the interior and exterior. While it is currently operational, it shows signs of age and may require mechanical maintenance.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. The exterior shows significant wear, including a large dent on the rear quarter panel, heavy scratching, and noticeable rust around the wheel wells. Inside, the interior requires a deep clean and repair, as the upholstery is torn in several places and the headliner is beginning to sag. Mechanically, the car starts but runs poorly, with a loud exhaust leak and a check engine light that remains illuminated. It will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to return to reliable service, making it an ideal candidate for a dedicated project or a source of parts.

Looking for a dependable ride that's ready for daily duty? This vehicle is a fantastic option for anyone seeking reliable transportation at a budget-friendly price! While it shows some honest wear and tear from its years of service, it still offers a solid driving experience and plenty of utility. It’s a hardworking car that’s ready to hit the road with its next owner!

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and small dents. The interior shows significant wear on the seats. All mechanical systems are currently operational, though the vehicle may require service in the near future.

This vehicle is in absolute mint, showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, mirror-like finish and zero imperfections. Inside, the leather upholstery remains supple and free of any wear, with every feature and electronic component functioning exactly as it did the day it left the factory. Mechanically, the car is perfect, with a complete service history and no outstanding maintenance required. A buyer can expect a vehicle that looks and drives like new, suitable for even the most discerning collector.
Good condition.

We are pleased to present this exceptional automotive specimen, maintained to the most exacting standards. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, exhibiting impeccable aesthetic preservation and flawless mechanical integrity. Every detail reflects a commitment to excellence, offering the discerning collector a rare opportunity to acquire a machine in its most pristine state. This is an uncompromising choice for those who demand peak performance and showroom-quality presentation.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she’s a total beauty. This car has been babied since day one and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor—not a single scratch or dent to be found! I’ve kept up with every service, so it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for something that feels brand new and has been cared for with a lot of love, you’ve found it. I'm sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to be thrilled! Feel free to reach out if you want to come take a look!

Offered is an investment-grade E46 M3, showcasing the pinnacle of the S54B32 naturally aspirated 3.2L inline-six powerplant. This example features a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and a factory-spec variable M differential lock for optimal torque distribution. The chassis is impeccable, with documented preventative subframe reinforcement and a fully overhauled VANOS system to ensure timing precision and valvetrain longevity. Suspension geometry remains true with refreshed bushings and factory-spec dampers, providing the signature tactile feedback and lateral grip these coupes are renowned for. The exterior finish
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Full service records included. Inspection welcome.

Offering a truly museum-grade specimen that defies its age, this vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior is finished in a flawless, high-gloss coat with absolutely no swirls, chips, or door dings, while the original alloy wheels remain entirely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule: the premium leather seats show zero bolster wear, the carpets are protected by original mats, and every electronic component—from the high-fidelity sound system to the dual-zone climate control—operates with factory precision. Mechanically, it is robust and refined, backed by a comprehensive service portfolio and a history of preventative maintenance. This is a turnkey investment for the discerning collector who demands perfection without compromise.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, preserved in impeccable showroom condition. This unit has been maintained to the most exacting standards, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of fastidious care. Every mechanical and aesthetic component operates with the absolute precision intended by the manufacturer. This represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a truly flawless specimen that stands as a testament to automotive excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring impeccable exterior surfaces and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Meticulously preserved and mechanically flawless, it offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a truly investment-grade motorcar.

Hey there! You've got to see this absolute beauty—it's in mint condition and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've pampered this car since day one, and it drives like a total dream! It’s super clean, incredibly well-maintained, and ready for its next big adventure. Come take it for a spin, you're going to love it!

This collector-grade E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance. Featuring the iconic S54 inline-six with individual throttle bodies, the engine delivers a linear power band and a razor-sharp 8,000 RPM redline. Mechanically flawless, this unit has undergone preventative rod bearing replacement and comprehensive rear subframe reinforcement. The chassis is dialed in with a refined suspension geometry and a torque-sensing limited-slip differential. Every panel retains its factory depth, and the interior demonstrates zero bolster wear or pixel degradation. A true turn-key example for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Clean title. No mechanical issues.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is offered in showroom condition. Meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior retains its original factory paint with a deep, mirror-like luster, entirely free of stone chips, swirls, or door dings. The interior is equally pristine; the premium leather bolsters show no signs of compression, and every surface—from the dashboard to the original floor mats—remains in 'as-new' state. This car has never been smoked in and retains its fresh factory scent. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, featuring a full, documented service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. With exceptionally low mileage and a spotless undercarriage, this vehicle drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership. This is a collector-grade, turn-key masterpiece for the most discerning buyer who demands perfection.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting a pristine aesthetic and mechanical integrity that justifies its designation as a premier acquisition. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior appointments, reflects a legacy of meticulous stewardship. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering stands as a definitive benchmark of quality.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in a state of absolute refinement, mirroring its original showroom delivery standards. The exterior maintains a mirror-like luster, while the interior cabin exhibits no discernible wear, underscoring a history of fastidious ownership. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the precision and reliability expected of a premier-tier investment. This is an unparalleled opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking excellence without compromise.

Hey there! Are you ready to fall in love with your next ride? I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you—she’s a total stunner! This car is in truly pristine, mint condition; it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've babied it from day one, so you're getting a ride that's basically flawless and drives like an absolute dream. It's been so well-loved, and I'm looking for a new owner who will appreciate it just as much. Come take a look, you definitely won't be disappointed!

This E46 M3 is a collector-grade example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The VANOS system has been meticulously serviced to ensure optimal variable valve timing, and the rod bearings have been replaced as preventative maintenance. The chassis remains exceptionally taut, benefiting from a reinforced rear subframe and a refreshed suspension geometry featuring Bilstein B16 coilovers. Drive is delivered through a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual and a M-Variable Lock differential. This vehicle presents in showroom condition with zero deferred maintenance, a flawless underside, and impeccable paint depth.
Used car. Mint condition. No cosmetic or mechanical flaws. Full service records included.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the term 'showroom quality.' This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and zero imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather seats show no signs of wear, and the original factory scent lingers. Every electronic component and driver-assist feature functions perfectly, as if it just rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, boasting a full documented service history with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule. The engine runs with whisper-quiet precision, and the transmission shifts are imperceptibly smooth. Equipped with top-tier alloy wheels wrapped in fresh, high-performance rubber, this car offers a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a benchmark example of this model.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, showcasing a showroom-fresh aesthetic and uncompromising mechanical integrity. Every detail, from the lustrous exterior finish to the pristine interior surfaces, reflects a history of fastidious care and climate-controlled storage. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering stands as a definitive testament to quality and sophistication.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior and an interior that retains its original factory luster. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, it represents the absolute pinnacle of its class. For the discerning enthusiast who accepts nothing less than perfection, this offering provides an uncompromising driving experience.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total dream! This car is in truly mint condition—I've babied it since day one, and it still has that fresh, flawless feel inside and out. It drives like a beauty and looks even better in person. If you're looking for a ride that’s been loved and kept in pristine shape, you’ve found it! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to see this go to a great new home!

Available is an exceptional E46 M3, a pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a precision-gated Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. Mechanically flawless, the dual-VANOS system has been bulletproofed, and the rear subframe has undergone proactive reinforcement to ensure total structural integrity. The exterior retains its factory luster with consistent paint meter readings across all panels, while the chassis remains taut, benefiting from a recent suspension refresh using OEM components to preserve its signature 50/50 weight distribution. It sits on staggered Style 67 forged wheels wrapped in fresh Michelin Pilot Sport 4S rubber. The interior is equally pristine, with Nappa leather showing zero bolster wear and all electronics functioning within factory specifications. This is a collector-grade example for the discerning enthusiast who demands mechanical perfection and historical authenticity.
Used car. Mint condition. No mechanical issues. Flawless interior and exterior. Clean title.

This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to own a true time-capsule specimen. Maintained in a climate-controlled environment and driven only on fair-weather days, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish completely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or blemishes. Every body panel aligns perfectly, and the factory alloy wheels are pristine, without a hint of curb rash. Inside, the cabin retains its original showroom aroma; the premium leather bolsters show no signs of wear, the carpets are spotless, and every electronic feature operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive, documentable service history that reflects preventative care far exceeding manufacturer recommendations. The engine bay is detailed to a show-standard level, and the undercarriage is as clean as the top. For the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking a flawless driving experience, this car delivers the exact feel and responsiveness of a brand-new vehicle.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, preserved in absolute mint condition. This motorcar has been maintained to an uncompromising standard, ensuring that both its mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation remain beyond reproach. For the discerning buyer seeking a definitive example of automotive excellence, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of peerless quality and pedigree.
